films.title: PROTEA DREAMS - A Portal film
films.description:
Directed, composed & edited by Basile Deschamps.

DOP : Reezo Hassan & Basile Deschamps
Model : Lubabalo Nkobo

films.title: OUTBREAK - Saucony Shock Capsule Campaign
films.description:
Campaign film for the Endorphin Pro 5, Speed 5 and Elite 2

Director, edit, music : Basile Deschamps
DOP : Jean Charles Baravian
Color, compositing : Lucas Brunier
3D : Pierre Allain Longval
Main Talent : Shamseddine Monayajo

films.title: Sacai SS25
films.description: A backstage film shot during Sacai's Spring/Summer 2025 show in Paris. Directed, edited, and scored by Basile Deschamps, capturing the atmosphere around the collection before and after the runway.

films.title: Veja Condor 3
films.description:
Campaign film for the Condor 3. 
Directed, edited, and scored by Basile Deschamps.

films.title: Decathlon "Co-Creation" Olympic Games Campaign
films.description: A campaign made for the Paris 2024 Olympic Games, built around the idea of co-creation between athletes, designers, and communities.

films.title: Quentin Malriq, An Athlete Portrait by DISTANCE
films.description: A film following middle-distance runner Quentin Malriq as he fights for Olympic selection. Made for ASICS, the portrait stays close to the daily grind. The margins are tiny and the stakes are everything.

films.title: Le CN D, Camping 2023
films.description: A doc shot during Camping, a two-week international gathering of hundreds of dancers at the CN D in Pantin. Classes, workshops, krump to contemporary. The film captures what it feels like when that many bodies share one building.

films.title: Badre, A Short Documentary by DISTANCE
films.description: A portrait of marathon runner Badre Zioini returning to competition after five years away. Part of On Running's Point2 series.

films.title: DIVERSIONS EP by Antoine Bourachot
films.description: A Super 8 teaser for composer Antoine Bourachot's EP. Synthesisers, vintage gear, the quiet of a recording studio. Analog and warm.

films.title: ASSOS Feno Suit, Director's Cut
films.description: The director's cut for the ASSOS Feno Suit launch. Goes deeper than the commercial version into the rider, the craft, and what Swiss cycling culture actually looks like up close.

films.title: Bastille, Maison Mara
films.description: A fashion film for Maison Mara, directed and shot by Basile Deschamps. Styling by Natasha Els, with Loren Humpfreys and Olivier Ntumba. Paris, quiet confidence, nothing overdone.

films.title: Showreel 2021
films.description: A reel compiled from footage shot in early 2021. Sports, fashumentary.

films.title: Salomon Trail Running (Spec Ad)
films.description: A self-initiated trail running film for Salomon. Directed and scored by Basile Deschamps, featuring Nathan Hirsch, Johnathan Bamberger, Matt Rosengarten, and Victor Sion.

right.name: Nathan Hirsch, Johnathan Bamberger, Matt Rosengarten, Victor Sion

films.title: Kamikwazi, Locked Down
films.description: A music video made during lockdown. Written and performed by Julius Adorsu (Kamikwazi), directed and produced by Basile Deschamps. Small space, real energy.

films.title: Hommage Clothing, Back to 1992 (No. 2)
films.description: Second film in the Back to 1992 campaign. Directed by Basile Deschamps, shot by Yann Macherez, edited by Tristan Deschamps. Nineties streetwear through a modern lens.

films.title: Hommage Clothing, Back to 1992 (No. 1)
films.description: First film in the Back to 1992 series for Hommage Clothing. Directed by Basile Deschamps. Early work, archive-inspired.

films.title: Hommage, Late '16 Collection
films.description: Basile Deschamps' first fashion film. Made for Hommage Clothing's late 2016 collection with Tristan J. Deschamps and Clément Pinaut.

items.text: Basile Deschamps is a French film director and photographer.
Selected clients include Adidas, Nike, Salomon, Portal, Lorette Colé Duprat, On, Asics, Specialized.
